title: CEDT Twin State Variable
description: Schema for a single Cancer Ecology Digital Twin (CEDT) state variable, as defined in data/adapters/twin_state_schema.json. Each variable belongs to one of five CEDT layers: host, exposure, tissue, metabolic, state_quality.

variable_id.description: Unique identifier for the twin state variable (e.g. 'CEDT.host.enzyme_activity_modifier').

variable_name.description: Human-readable name of the twin state variable.

layer.description: CEDT layer this variable belongs to.

dtype.description: Data type of the variable value.

unit.description: Unit of measurement, or null if categorical/dimensionless.

source_adapter.description: Adapter ID that populates this variable (e.g. 'EG3.ADAPT.FLUX.METABOLIC.v2'), or null if multi-source.

source_port.description: Source module output port name (e.g. 'activation_score'), or null if categorical/derived.

transform.description: Transformation applied from source port to twin variable.

null_when.description: Documented condition under which this variable is null (e.g. 'INTERACTION not run in single-exposure scenarios').

version_origin.description: Phase in which this variable was introduced.
